shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The board keeps a 9-column by 7-row layout with 64px cells.
differences: The center lane reserves a clean anchor for the balance axis.
Hover-ready cells stay readable under route overlays.
The frame leaves space for popups and side panels.

context.usage: Primary placement board for all slime units and hazard routes.

specs.texture: Mud-filled cells with moss rims and hover-ready contrast.
specs.shading: Flat bevel with brighter upper-left edges.

acceptance_criteria: Board texture size is exactly 576x448px and resolves to 9 columns by 7 rows of 64x64px cells.
The board frame leaves at least 24px of outer margin.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle root with child hover masks.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/art_000002.png before spawning GridCell entities.
runtime_notes: Keep the board origin aligned to the gameplay grid.
Expose board origin and cell size through a resource.
Render hover tint through child sprites rather than alternate board textures.
